text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Without further ado—it begins! Welcome to the Tracen Academy
Pretty Grand Prix!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like our whimsical director has cooked up another new event.
The students gathered here in the gym immediately start chattering
among themselves.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Explanation! As Umamusume, you must be strong both on and off the
track!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hence! You will compete in three areas: performing, public speaking,
and racing! The top four from the preliminaries will then vie for
victory in the finals!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Accepting entrants! From tomorrow, you can enter yourself or
recommend another! I await your courageous challenges!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: What a lov'ly event! City, I'll put your name down for you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wait, Yukino?! Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Grand Prix are just da bomb, aren't they? I'm gettin' revved up just
imagining it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (Sigh... Director Akikawa is back at it again...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (...I would love to see Groove excel in the Grand Prix.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Pretty Grand Prix, huh? Leave it up to the director to come up
with something like this. Either way, it doesn't have much to do with
Curren Chan—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Brooo! Get this, get this! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Siiis! Get this, get this! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Just now! I signed myself up for the Grand Prix!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Like, it's called the Pretty Grand Prix, right? It's an event fit
for Curren, through and through—they might as well put my name on
it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Big Bro, make sure you cheer me on looots, okay? ♪ You do that, and
I'll try my bestest to win!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Big Sis, make sure you cheer me on looots, okay? ♪ You do that, and
I'll try my bestest to win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad she's motivated... but I'm also worried her Grand Prix training
might get in the way of her normal training.
choice_data_list:
Right now, the priority should be working on
your fundamentals...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'll keep working on my fundies. But at the same time...
the Grand Prix is just as important to me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, y'know! I need more people to know how much of a cutie-pie I
am! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Is clout really the only thing on her mind? Once again, I feel lost in
the dark when it comes to Curren Chan.
choice_data_list: So you're committed to the Grand Prix?
So you're committed to the Grand Prix?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Um, um! Big Bro, I wanna show you my best.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Um, um! Big Sis, I wanna show you my best.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Won't you let me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her cutesy tone makes it difficult for me to make a decision. This time
though, sensing a new air of determination around her, I reluctantly
agree.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, I can't keep letting her push me around like this. Resolved
to figure out what makes her tick, I pick up my phone and open her
Umasta.

text_block_list.name: @Curren
text_block_list.text:
"Check out this Miracle Pegasus Parfait I had today! ♪
#FeelTheRainbow #CurrenSmile #CuteCurrenChan"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oh, here's a selfie she posted of her eating a parfait... Wait, 49,906
likes?! Let's take a peek at the comments section...

text_block_list.name: @Curren_is_MyLife
text_block_list.text:
"Even though Curren posts at least three times a day on her Umasta,
she never drops a single clue about her private life."

text_block_list.name: @cuteeeeeCurren
text_block_list.text:
"I know, right? Usually, you can get a general vibe of where people
live or who they hang out with from their photos."

text_block_list.name: @Curren_is_MyLife
text_block_list.text:
"She's a real enigma. Every photo is always in a different place with
different people. 'Course, that air of mystery is one of the things I
love about her!"

text_block_list.name: @UMA_hunter
text_block_list.text:
"I know the truth. Curren is actually an alien. I mean, she's way too
perfect to be human."

text_block_list.name: @UMA_hunter
text_block_list.text:
"Some of my buddies say she's an Horsegirl: Unidentified Mysterious
Angel. They say she stays so cute by sucking the blood of others like
a chupacabra."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...That's enough internet for today. The more I read about Curren
Chan, the less I feel I know about her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the day of the Pretty Grand Prix preliminaries has arrived.
First up is the performance section...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Everyone! Send me all your love and support, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Emitting her usual superstar aura, Curren Chan captivates the crowd
and passes with flying colors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following public speaking section goes about the same way.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Today, I've brought an item that'll make everyone even cuter! ♪ My
personal recommendation is... this golden cream foundation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The last part of the preliminary involves a time trial race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Time to show my stuff! ♪ Make sure you catch me
shining—not just with your eyes, but your cameras too!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Aieeek! We love you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan has natural talent. As long as she performs like in
practice, she should be able to get a respectable time... Before long,
the race kicks off.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeppity-yep, I'm feeling great! ♪ Everyone! Keep your eyes on me—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm? That's weird...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something's off about Curren Chan's running form. Most of the
spectators are so absorbed in her cuteness that they haven't noticed
yet, but I'm sure of it...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Eep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her form is showing cracks! There's no way she's beating her old
record like this!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...At this rate—nnnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan powers past the finish line, but her time leaves
something to be desired. Still, thanks to her previous two scores, she
manages to qualify for the finals.

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear? Her cleat fell off her shoe. It's proof she slacked off on
her race prep.

text_block_list.name: Race-loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, looks like she couldn't care less about racing. If she wanted to
be an idol, she should've just gone somewhere else.

text_block_list.name: Fangirl Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Curren... I didn't want to see you like this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Did Curren Chan overhear what they were saying? Either way, she's
curled up into a ball in front of the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Nope. Failing like this is no good. Getting carried away, embarrassing myself... That's not cute.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: If this is the best I can do...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I don't deserve... to be with Big Bro.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I don't deserve... to be with Big Sis.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I have a chance to say anything, Curren Chan runs off
somewhere. This loss hit her way harder than I thought it would...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't seem like the type of person to let the naysayers get to
her. But then, why was she so upset?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Turning back to the track, I spy Curren Chan's lone cleat, now only
faintly reflecting the brilliant light of the sun.
